channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Top DHS spokesperson who became a face of Trump immigration policy is leaving
item.description: Tricia McLaughlin has become the public face defending the Trump administration's mass deportation policy and immigration tactics over the past year.

item.title: A photojournalist details her rebellion against the Syrian regime -- and her father
item.description: Loubna Mrie grew up in Syria, where her father was allegedly an assassin for the regime. She joined the Syrian revolution first as a protester and the...

item.title: U.S. releases new details on alleged secret Chinese nuclear test
item.description: At a event in Washington D.C., A U.S. official said a remote earthquake in 2020 was caused by a Chinese nuclear test.

item.title: The very polite, unheated rivalry between Jordan Stolz and Jenning de Boo
item.description: The two top speedskating sprinters in the world are a cut above the competition. They battle fiercely on the ice, but refuse to trash talk

item.title: A safe space for girls who've faced sexual violence
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo is seeing a significant increase in acts of sexual violence against girls and young women. A support center offers a ...

item.title: Climactic launches hybrid fund to get startups through the ‘valley of death’
item.description: The new project, called Material Scale, will initially focus on climate tech startups in the apparel industry.

item.title: Anthropic releases Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Anthropic has released a new version of its mid-size Sonnet model, keeping pace with the company's four-month update cycle.

item.title: Why Thousands Are Flocking to North Carolina’s Explosive Real Estate and Job Market
item.description: “Follow the money” is cogent advice for investors deciding which Sunbelt state to invest in. Unlike in previous years, however, the money trail leads ...

item.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
item.description: A gunman who opened fire at a Rhode Island youth hockey game, killing two adults and injuring three others, was stopped after a spectator intervened.

item.title: Meta’s own research found parental supervision doesn’t really help curb teens’ compulsive social media use
item.description: An internal research study at Meta found that parental supervision may not help teens regulate their social media, and teens with trauma are more incl...

item.title: How to Buy Five Short-Term Rentals in Five Years
item.description: Everyone hears “five Airbnbs in five years” and immediately pictures some kind of motivational speaker montage. You know the one: And then year two hi...

item.title: The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
Apple is reportedly cooking up a trio of AI wearables
item.description: As the AI hardware space heats up, the iPhone maker has multiple smart products in development.

item.title: Thrive raises $10B for new fund, its largest yet
item.description: Thrive Capital just raised $10 billion for its new fund-- nearly double the size of its last fund.

item.title: Minnesota’s Legislature braces for a federal immigration fight as the enforcement surge winds down
2026 Mortgage Update: Lower Rates, ARMs Return, and When to Refi
item.description: Rental property financing is becoming much easier. For years, seven and eight-percent rates made it brutal to make deals work. But now, things are cha...

item.title: Buying 4 Small Multifamily Rentals in Just 2 Years (While Working a W2)
item.description: The what-ifs of real estate investing keep many rookies on the sidelines indefinitely. But when today’s guest determined his “safe” nine-to-five was j...

item.title: Stop Buying Rentals and Start Buying Rental Portfolios (Scale Much Faster)
item.description: If you want financial freedom faster, you need to stop buying rentals and start buying rental portfolios. Most people have never thought about it. Ins...
